title: JobTracker Configuration Interface
description: The 'JTConfig.java' file in the 'server/jobtracker' directory of Hadoop MapReduce serves as a configuration holder for the JobTracker component. It extends 'MRConfig' and provides constants for various JobTracker configuration parameters, such as IPC address, job status persistence, and memory limits. This Java interface doesn't process inputs or produce outputs directly; instead, it defines constants used system-wide for JobTracker configuration. Its dependencies include 'MRConfig' and the 'org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.server.jobtracker' package, indicating its role within the JobTracker component of Hadoop MapReduce. The architectural pattern here is a simple configuration interface, adhering to the principle of separation of concerns by keeping configuration details isolated from other system components.
